Introduction
Bonus: Operation Quick Start
Overview
• It’s about getting started fast
• Building a sustainable, lasting business
• About getting early progress you can build upon
• It’s all possible
Everyone starts at the beginning…
• I started my first online business in 1996
• I studied the stock market for several years before
I decided to publish a newsletter and start
building a list
• I had no technical knowledge and couldn’t afford
web hosting and a domain name
• I got an ugly site put up on a platform that was
free
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Everyone starts at the beginning…
• I started publishing and building an email list and
within a few months had several hundred
subscribers
• I launched my first product (a paid newsletter)
and made $1650 on my first launch
• My last big launch was over $5 million dollars
Everyone starts at the beginning…
• The most important step is the first one - the
action you take to get going
• I’ve learned a lot in the last 20+ years and this
bonus is all about how to help you take that first
step and get going quickly
More important…
• I’ve coached tens of thousands of people…
• Some started from zero and some have million-
dollar businesses
• But many never went anywhere
• Or had short term success and then faded away
• Much of what’s in this course is about the
difference between those two…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
This is what I’ve learned about getting
started…
• You want to get started fast - because momentum
brings more momentum
• Life is easier when you have momentum
• But just as important is stamina…
This is why I have had success and have been
able to sustain success
This is what I’ve learned about getting
started…
• Measure the right things:
• Not logos
• Not fancy design
• Not social media likes
• For me it was SUBSCRIBERS
• (and I would suggest that’s a good place to
start)
This is what I’ve learned about getting
started…
• I knew subscribers were valuable
• So I focused on getting more subscribers… every
single day
• One a day
• Four a day
• etc…
• 34 a day is 1,000 a month
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
This is what I’ve learned about getting
started…
• $1 per month per subscriber is a good
benchmark
• Early on, as I watched subscribers grow, I knew I
was making progress
• You might want to do the same
• Social Media followers don’t count
• You want email subscribers
Remember… progress not perfection
What we’ll cover:
• Mental Game - Part 1
• First Steps
• Tools for Getting Started
• Mental Game - Part 2
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
